chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Appeal No.262 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.4686/2024 ------------------------------------- 21.05.2025 Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. ------------------------------------ Appellant Muhammad Aamir alias Minto son of Rana Muhammad Yasin was tried by learned Additional Sessions Judge-VI, Karachi East, in Sessions Case No.506/2023, arising out of FIR No.578/2022, registered at P.S. Shah Faisal Colony, Karachi for offence under Sections 324, 353, 186, 34, read with section 512, PPC. After full dressed trial, appellant was convicted under section 353, PPC and sentenced to 1 year’s R.I. Benefit of section 382-B, Cr.PC was extended to appellant. Hence the instant appeal. Jail roll was called from Superintendent, District Prison and Correctional Facility Malir, Karachi, which reveals that the appellant has served out his sentence and has been released from jail on 06.04.2024. Thereafter, appellant has never approached this Court to contest his appeal on merits, which shows that he is are not interested to contest his appeal. Therefore, instant criminal appeal is dismissed as having become infructuous. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
